title: T5 Statement of Investment Income – slip information for individuals - Canada.ca
content:
## T5 Statement of Investment Income – slip information for individuals
For detailed information on the amounts shown in the boxes of your T5 slip, see the corresponding box number below the following image:

## Boxes 10, 11, and 12 – Dividends from Canadian corporations other than eligible dividends
Report as income the amount shown in box 11 on lines 12010 and line 12000 of your return.
The dividend tax credit to which an individual is entitled is shown in box 12 and can be claimed at line 40425 in the Federal Worksheet.

## Box 13 – Interest from Canadian sources
See line 12100 to know how to report this amount on your return.

## Box 18 – Capital gains dividends
Enter this amount on line 17400 of Schedule 3, Capital Gains (or Losses) .

## Boxes 24, 25, and 26 – Eligible dividends from Canadian corporations
Report as income the amount shown in box 25 on line 12000 of your return.
The dividend tax credit to which you are entitled is shown in box 26 and can be claimed at line 40425 in the Federal Worksheet.

### Box 14 – Other income from Canadian sources
See line 12100 to know how to report this amount on your return.

### Box 15 – Foreign income
See line 12100 to know how to report this amount on your return.

### Box 16 – Foreign tax paid
This amount is used to calculate your foreign tax credit. For more information, see line 40500 .

### Box 17 – Royalties from Canadian sources
If royalties are from a work or invention of yours, enter the amount on line 10400 of your return.
Enter on line 13500 your royalties that have expenses associated with them.
Otherwise, enter the amount on line 12100 of your return.

### Box 19 – Accrued income: Annuities
This amount is the earnings part of a general annuity.
If you were 65 or older at the end of the year, or if you received the annuity payments because of the death of your spouse or common-law partner, report this amount on line 11500 of your return.
Otherwise, enter this amount on line 12100 of your return.

### Box 30 – Equity linked notes interest
Deemed interest from the assignment or transfer of linked notes.
Enter this amount on line 12100 of your return.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
